---
title: "In-class Ex06"
author: "TAN Chin Khoon"
date: "04 October 2025"
date-modified: "last-modified"
---


```{r}



```




```{r}



```





```{r}



```





```{r}



```





```{r}



```




```{r}



```




```{r}



```



```{r}



```




```{r}



```




```{r}



```




```{r}



```




```{r}



```




```{r}



```




```{r}



```




```{r}



```





```{r}



```




```{r}



```



```{r}



```





```{r}



```





```{r}



```





```{r}



```





```{r}



```






```{r}



```





```{r}



```





```{r}



```




```{r}



```



```{r}



```




```{r}



```




```{r}



```



```{r}



```
